stories.headline: Three arrested over Glasgow disorder and racist assaults after Belfast knife attack
stories.description: Police Scotland said members of the public were attacked "because of the colour of their skin" on Tuesday evening.

stories.headline: Netanyahu caught between the US, Lebanon war, and Iran ceasefire
stories.description: As elections near, Israel’s PM finds himself squeezed between his voters, his allies, and his opponents.

stories.headline: Apache down, fighting up: What the latest US-Iran attacks mean
stories.description: Analysts say Iran seeks to deter US patrols on the Strait of Hormuz by attacking its assets across the Gulf.

stories.headline: Precision radiotherapy for prostate cancer to cut sessions from 20 to five
stories.description: Some men in England with the disease will now be offered an advanced form of treatment on the NHS.

stories.headline: Doctor Who: BBC cancels planned Christmas special
stories.description: The BBC said the decision was made "after careful consideration" and had "not been taken lightly".
